about_item: Comfort & Convenience: The Kurgo Explorer Dog Carrier is a comfortable carrier for travel built with breathable mesh sides and padded handles for all-day support and airflow
Durable & Easy to Clean: Made with a muck proof bottom and armorsole base, this soft-sided pet carrier resists moisture and dirt and is easy to wipe clean after messy trips
Safe & Functional Travel Features: Designed with an attached interior tether for harness security, it attaches to the car seat belt and includes a zippered storage pocket for small items
Designed for Real-World Adventures: Kurgo gear is built to solve everyday challenges with dogs, making travel, walks, and outdoor play safer, easier, and more fun for both of you
Durable Gear, Lifetime Promise: Engineered for longevity and reliability, every Kurgo product is crafted with rugged materials and backed by our industry-leading lifetime warranty

summary.text: Customers find the dog carrier to be of great quality and sturdy, with one mentioning its rubber bottom. The comfort and size receive mixed feedback, with some finding it comfortable while others say it's slightly uncomfortable, and several noting it's a bit small.

authors_reviews.title: Strong, durable, and so comfortable!
authors_reviews.text: My 9.5 lb chihuahua grey hound mix has chewed or scratched through every pet carrier bag we have purchased except for this one. This bag has breathable netting that is made of strong and thick fabric. The bag is spacious, well made with a solid base and structure yet is so comfortable for our fur baby. Perfect for us frequent flyers and traveler - long flights 6hr+ and cross country road trips. Highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: KC

authors_reviews.title: Love this carrier!
authors_reviews.text: It’s the perfect size, easily to travel with (carrying and under the airline seat) and has a super sturdy bottom made of rubber. Kurgo makes the best products for our pets… I’ve been using their crash tested hardnesses for 8 years. Only wish… there’s was another pocket on the other side. Thanks Kurgo! ❤️
authors_reviews.author: Stephanie Cemo

authors_reviews.title: Great product
authors_reviews.text: I love the durability and features. Well made. Do wish it were available in cute colors though.
authors_reviews.author: Nicole

authors_reviews.title: Fit an Australian Terrier
authors_reviews.text: I was dubious about the size of the bag, but the big bag is big enough to fit my Australian Terrier. He is 1 year and 7 months old, and weights 9 kg. He is tight inside the bag, but not uncomfortable. He is able to turn and stand up. We had our first flight yesterday. It was a short trip, less than an hour. He is a barker, but inside the bag, he was quiet and still, nobody notice we were traveling with a dog. So far so good. I am happy with the carrier.
authors_reviews.author: Ele

authors_reviews.title: Awkward and bulky
authors_reviews.text: I got the large for a 12 lb. dog. The kurgo is definitely sturdy and well made, but it is also bulky and thick and awkward to use. When you zip up the top the flap zips all the way down to enclose the opening of the head. So either you zip it all the way or don’t zip it at all because there is no way to fold back the flap. Its summertime now and the bulky-ness bugs me, I may like it better in the winter. I am keeping it because it does the job and in case I need an emergency tote. But I am looking for another tote to use regularly.
authors_reviews.author: SyllieC

authors_reviews.title: Innovative and functional
authors_reviews.text: I loved the style , the quality materials and enough room for my dog to be comfortable inside and comfortable to carry around or take in plane. I am very pleased with the brand and would consider other products by Kurgo.
authors_reviews.author: Owney1

authors_reviews.title: great carry-on
authors_reviews.text: Easy to take on the airplane.
authors_reviews.author: Eddie Tsai

authors_reviews.title: Well designed but slightly uncomfortable
authors_reviews.text: A lot of nice features. Removable pad on the hard bottom that can be washed, the opening can be zipped partway and velcrod to have an opening if your dog prefers looking out and the strap is adjustable. It was slightly uncomfortable walking my dog in it as the hard bottom would bounce off my leg. Couldn't get it adjusted right to not avoid that. Shorter walks this wasn't an issue, but my other dog likes long walks and taking my puppy along wasn't ideal. Would recommend still for most cases.
authors_reviews.author: Hoa N.

other_countries_reviews.title: Bellissimo
other_countries_reviews.text: Sebbene l'abbia restituito perché il mio gatto non ci entrava, è un prodotto fatto veramente bene. Però è adatto ad animale che non vada oltre i 4,5 kg. La mia gatta di poco più di 5kg era troppo schiacciata all'interno. Ho preso la versione più grande, anche se il colore era più bello questo.
other_countries_reviews.author: Cliente Amazon

other_countries_reviews.title: Very sturdy and good quality
other_countries_reviews.text: Really pleased with this product. Can't wait to take my buddy out in it.
other_countries_reviews.author: M S.

other_countries_reviews.title: Solide et pratique
other_countries_reviews.text: Assez grand pour qu'un petit chien ou un chat y soit à l'aise. Solide et pratique, la coque qui correspond au fond du sac évite de salir la voiture ou le siège en cas d'accident.
other_countries_reviews.author: Bidule

other_countries_reviews.title: Gute Reisetasche für Mini-Hunde
other_countries_reviews.text: Positiv: wasserdichte Unterseite, geringes Gewicht, Schultergurt lang genug zum diagonal-tragen, Verarbeitung erscheint wertig. Leider fällt das „Dach“ nach unten, wenn man es einklappt, da es relativ schwer ist. Damit fällt es dem Hund nicht leicht, selbständig von außen in die Tasche einzusteigen. Größer als ein normal großer Chihuahua sollte der Hund nicht sein, da es dann in der Tasche recht eng wird. Insgesamt jedoch für meinen Hund passend, für das geplante Reiseziel als Körbchen absolut ideal.Daher von mir eine Empfehlung.Update:Nach mehreren Reisen und im Dauergebrauch daheim immer noch absolut in Ordnung. Die abwaschbare Unterseite der Tasche hat sich schon auf der Fähre im Regen bewährt…
other_countries_reviews.author: Fatma

other_countries_reviews.title: Great option for miniature dachshund
other_countries_reviews.text: Good quality construction and the L is the perfect length for my miniature dachshund to lay down. The bottom is supportive and has soft lining so he feels comfortable. Carrying straps are comfortable for me as well, weight is well distributed. Great alternative to backpack carriers.
other_countries_reviews.author: Nikki
